description: EU-hosted LLM guardrails — PII and secret redaction, prompt-injection detection, and content moderation behind one endpoint. See https://bench.vetocheck.com for the head-to-head benchmark.

apiKey.label: Veto API Key
apiKey.description: Your vt_live_… key from the Veto dashboard.

apiBase.label: Veto API Base
apiBase.description: Gateway base URL. Defaults to https://api.vetocheck.com.

description.text: Scans text through the Veto gateway. Fails the guardrail (verdict=false) on a block verdict — and fail-closed on an unreachable gateway; masks PII/secrets in place (transformedData) on a redact verdict.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Subset of detectors to run. Defaults to all.

redact.label: Apply redaction
redact.description: Rewrite content when Veto returns a redact verdict.
